title: More Zetterstrand Paintings
description: Changes the non-Zetterstrand paintings to more of his works
body:
**Support Zetterstrand by buying a print from the donation link!**

(Versions lower than 1.19 only change the Wither painting)
### Replacements:
Wither -> [Cactus Bird](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/CactusBird_1920.jpg)

Earth -> [Selfportrait (2002)](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/sp02.jpg)

Fire -> [The Sick Bull](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/The-Sick-Bull-91x104cmink-airbrush-vinyl-and-oil-on-canvas-2017-Zetterstrand-2000.jpg)

Water -> [The Reveal](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/The-Reveal.-42-x-49-cm.-Oil-on-canvas-2019-Kristoffer-Zetterstrand-1920-.jpg)

Wind -> [The Grove IV](https://zetterstrand.com/eventz/wp-content/uploads/The-Grove-IV-89x71cm-Oil-on-canvas-2021-1200.jpg)
